name: recall-skill
context_prose:
Scoped slice of [c3-skills.md](c3-skills.md): the L3 edges that touch E12. R-edges cite the
P-list each edge backs.

edges.label: instructs agent to call engram recall (P1–P3)

properties.name: Two invocation modes
properties.statement: For all invocations of the recall skill, the body distinguishes exactly two modes: a no-args mode triggered by `/recall` with no query, and a query mode triggered by `/recall <query>`.

properties.name: Calls `engram recall` (no-args)
properties.statement: For all no-args invocations, the skill instructs the agent to run `engram recall` with no flags.
properties.notes: Backs L3 R3 for the no-args branch.

properties.name: Calls `engram recall --query` (query mode)
properties.statement: For all query-mode invocations, the skill instructs the agent to run `engram recall --query "<the user's query>"` with the user-supplied query string.
properties.notes: Backs L3 R3 for the query branch.

properties.name: Summarizes no-args output
properties.statement: For all completed no-args invocations, the skill instructs the agent to summarize the output covering: what was being discussed/decided, what work was done (filtering mundane tool calls), and which memories were active.
properties.notes: Three-bullet summary contract; output is not silently consumed.

properties.name: Presents query results
properties.statement: For all completed query-mode invocations, the skill instructs the agent to present the filtered results to the user.
properties.notes: Closes the loop in query mode — results surface to the user.

properties.name: Trigger phrases declared
properties.statement: For all skill loads, the description frontmatter declares the trigger phrases (`/recall`, "what was I working on", "load previous context", "search session history", resume work from a previous session) used by Claude Code's skill router to dispatch to this skill.
properties.notes: Discoverability contract; routing is performed by the harness, not the skill body.
